title: Email Sequence Builder
description: Creates a 3-email nurture sequence from strategy, with Gmail dispatch after human approval.

nodes.title: Sequence Topic
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what should the email sequence be about? Suggest: (A) Welcome sequence for new subscribers, (B) Nurture sequence for a specific offer, (C) Launch sequence for a new product/feature, (D) Custom topic.

nodes.title: Sequence Strategy
nodes.prompt: Create a 6-field brief for the email sequence. Also define: sequence goal, audience segment, email cadence (timing between emails).

nodes.title: Write Emails
nodes.prompt: Write 3 emails for the sequence using the email-sequence template. Email 1: hook and pain. Email 2: contradiction and proof. Email 3: meaning and CTA. Apply voice match.

nodes.title: Review Sequence
nodes.prompt: Show all 3 email drafts to the user. Ask: (A) Approve all and send via Gmail, (B) Edit specific emails, (C) Hold for later, (D) Reject and rewrite.

nodes.title: Send via Gmail
nodes.prompt: For approved emails: create Gmail drafts first, then send each email with the appropriate delay between them. Return send status for each.
